items.title: High-energy neutrino constraints on primordial black holes as dark matter
items.summary: arXiv:2604.09762v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Primordial black holes (PBHs) are one of the most appealing dark matter candidates over a wide range of masses and abundances. This broad parameter space has been constrained by a variety of observational probes. In this work, for t…
